Saturn in H1 and Jupiter in H6 or H7 gives wealth and prosperity/growth after marriage, provided none of them gets debilitated during annual position.: Wealth and prosperity after marriage
Jupiter acts as malefic when Saturn is in house 1 and Jupiter is in house 7.: Jupiter acts as malefic
Jupiter acts as malefic when Saturn is in house 2 and Jupiter is in house 8 or 12.: Jupiter acts as malefic
Jupiter acts as malefic when Saturn is in house 3 and Jupiter is in houses 5, 9 or 11.: Jupiter acts as malefic
Jupiter acts as malefic when Saturn is in house 4 and Jupiter is in houses 2, 8, 10 or 11.: Jupiter acts as malefic

If Saturn or Jupiter is in H2-5 and the other is in H9-12, then after the age of Saturn (9, 18, 36) up to the age of Jupiter, father, grandfather and tutor will be adversely affected.: Father, grandfather and tutor will be adversely affected between age of Saturn and Jupiter
If Jupiter is in H1-6 and Mercury in H7-12, Jupiter will be benefic till 34th year and Mercury will be malefic from 35th.: Jupiter benefic until 34, Mercury malefic from 35
If Rahu is exalted or in houses 1-6 AND Sun, Moon, and Mars are benefic, Jupiter becomes benefic, providing worldly/spiritual power and strength.: Jupiter becomes benefic and bestows power.
A father's debt causes illiteracy in the clan IF Mercury, Venus, Rahu, or Saturn are in H2, H5, H9, or H12.: Illiteracy in the clan.
If Jupiter in H2 is unpolluted and alone, and H9 has no malefic influence or presence of Mercury, Venus, and Rahu, wealth flows.: Wealth flows.
Venus in H8 and Saturn in H10 causes unhappiness, poor health and adulterous wife.: Nights unhappy, poor health and adulterous wife.
Mercury in H8 and Saturn in H10 causes loss of wealth, poor health of elders, and self in jail.: Loss of wealth, elders' health poor, self also in jail.
Moon in H12, Saturn in H4 and malefic Mercury is destructive.: Destruction
Friendly planets Sun, Moon, Mars in H2 AND Jupiter in 3rd house of the annual chart, brings prosperity between the ages of 26 and 46.: Prosperity all around between age of 26 to 46.
Exalted Saturn and Mercury in H7 creates beneficial connection with foreign affairs.: Beneficial connection with foreign affairs.
Malefic Mercury in houses 3 or 9 can cause a fondness for talking to females, poor health, blood problems.: Fondness for talking to females, poor health, blood problems.
If Saturn is in House 9 or 7, and there is a Fish Line and Moon is benefic, the native gains wealth.: The native gains wealth
If Saturn is malefic and Moon is in H4, helping the poor leads to punishment.: Punishment for helping the poor.
Saturn in H1, H4, or H10 combined with an empty H2 leads to poor conditions and lack of respect.: Poor conditions, no respect, and struggling for basic necessities.

If houses 2, 4, 5, and 6 are all empty, the native is an unfortunate loner in the family.: Unfortunate loner in family, no help from others, repeated deaths of wives, a child will die, run away, or separate.
If Mercury is in H4, H9, or H10, the father will die of blood poisoning when the native is young.: Father's death from blood poisoning at a young age for the native.
Sun in H3 or H5 and Saturn in H9 causes poor results with Saturnian items, leading to fire, poison, or conflict.: Poor results, fire, poison, conflict.
Sun, Saturn, and Mercury in H4, H5, and H9 adversely affect wife, wealth, children, and travel.: Adverse effects on wife, wealth, children, and travel.
Mercury in H6 and Moon in H2 lead to poor eyesight and negative effects of Saturn.: Poor eyesight and negative Saturn effects.
If Rahu and Ketu are exalted, the family gets plenty of wealth.: Family wealth increases.
Mercury in H6 with an unpolluted Sun brings royal wealth through honest earnings.: Increase in wealth through honest means.

Rahu, Ketu, and Saturn in H5, along with Venus, Moon, and Rahu in H2/7, indicate poor physical health; items of Venus' house suffer.: Poor physical health, adverse effect on items of the house containing Venus.
If Sun and Venus are in H5, wife's skin will be adversely affected around age 25/34.: Wife's skin adversely affected.

If friendly planets are with Sun and enemy planets in the same house, the evil effect passes onto items related to friendly planets in that house.: Evil effect transfers to items related to friendly planets.
Wealth increases when Moon is in H2 and Saturn is in H11.: Increase in wealth
Sun in H1 with Saturn influence (25%) leads to vice habits despite power and religiosity.: Prone to vice habits.
Wife will be sickly, especially if the native is fond of daytime sexual activity with his wife, with Venus in H7.: Wife's health is poor.
When Sun is in H3 and Mercury is malefic, Ketu and maternal uncles suffer.: Ketu and maternal uncles suffer.
When Sun is in H3 and Moon is malefic, losses or thefts occur during the day.: Losses/thefts in day time.
When Sun is in H3, as long as the Moon is benefic, one's condition remains good, despite malefic influences in H9 and H11.: One's condition remains good.
When Sun is in H3 and Mercury is either with the Sun or adjacent, the native is proficient in Mathematics, Astrology and allied subjects.: Proficient in Mathematics, Astrology and allied subjects.
When Sun is in H3 and Moon is strong, one will be blessed with wealth till old age.: Blessed with wealth till old age.

When Sun is in H3 and Mercury is conjoined, traits of the third house will be favourable but the traits of Mercury may not always remain favourable.: Traits of third house favourable, but traits of Mercury may not be.
If Sun is in H5 and Jupiter is in H10, one loses wives.: One loses wives.
If Sun is in H5 and Saturn is in H3, one loses sons.: One loses sons.
If the Moon is malefic and Rahu and Ketu are in the 5th house, harm occurs at ages 11 and 22.: Harm occurs at ages 11 and 22.

If Sun is in the 6th house and the 2nd house is blank, either the native or their father will serve and gain through the government at the age of 22.: Either the native or their father will serve and gain through the government at the age of 22.
Rahu in the 2nd house and Saturn in the 8th house deprives the native or his wife or both from one eye.: Will deprive the native or his wife or both from one eye.
Jupiter, Venus, and Rahu/Ketu/Sun together destroy separate Mercury.: TB, suicide, fire, defalcations. One would be extremely unhappy.
When Jupiter is before Moon and Ketu is after Moon, Moon becomes malefic, but if Mercury is benefic, Moon gives favorable results.: Moon's effects shift from malefic to benefic.
Father's financial position declines with the native's education, unless Ketu is benefic and unafflicted by Moon.: Father's financial condition declines.
Comfortable life if Venus and Mercury or Mars and Mercury are in the 7th house AND 8th house is not malefic.: Very comfortable life

If one marries before the age of 28 when 7th house is blank, then mother, mother-in-law, grandmother or mother of mother and brothers will be diseased and unlucky.: Mother, mother-in-law, grandmother or mother of mother and brothers will be diseased and unlucky.
Sun in the 1st house and Saturn in the 11th house gives Divine strength.: Divine strength.
If the Moon is with two other malefic planets and Rahu and Ketu are in the 9th house, the wife is malefic.: Wife is malefic
Sun in 5th house and Jupiter in 2nd house creates a Royal combination for wealth.: Creates a Royal combination conferring wealth.

If Venus or Saturn are in the first house, one will lead a comfortable life unless one forgets their deity, in which case they will be extremely unfortunate.: One will lead a comfortable life but if one forgets his deity, he will be extremely unfortunate.
If houses 4, 8, and 12 are afflicted, the Moon is malefic until age 34.: Moon is malefic until age 34

If Mercury is in the 2nd house and Jupiter is in its own houses (9th and 12th), the parents have a long life and the Moon behaves beneficially in the 8th house.: Parents have a long life and Moon becomes benefic
If Rahu, Ketu, Saturn, Venus, and Mercury are in the 11th house and the 2nd house is empty, the Moon in the 8th house kills the mother at age 24.: Mother's death at age 24
Poor life until the age of 34 if Mercury and Sun are malefic.: Difficult life until age 34.
Even if Rahu, Ketu, and Saturn are in House 3 or conjoined with the Moon in H9, House 5 will still be strong.: House 5 is strengthened even with malefic influences.
If Rahu is malefic and linked to Moon in H9, judgement is clouded.: Clouded judgement.
Financial success only after 34th or 48th year if Ketu is in House 2 and Mercury is in House 5.: Financial success delayed until later in life.
Venus in House 3 along with Moon in House 9 will give the results of the companion planets.: Results based on associated planets.
If Moon is in the 12th house and Mars is in the 1st house, the native receives respect from rulers and superiors.: respect from rulers and superiors

If Moon is in the 12th house and Ketu is in the 1st house, the native is unlucky and faces litigations, prosecutions, and warrants of arrest.: unlucky native, litigations, prosecutions, warrants of arrest
If Moon is in the 12th house and Mercury is in the 1st house, the native experiences loss and grief through superiors and official position.: loss and grief through superiors and official position
If Moon is in the 12th house and Mars is in the 2nd house, gains through in-laws are uninterrupted.: uninterrupted gains through in-laws
If Moon is in the 12th house and Ketu is in the 2nd house, the native is very unlucky for in-laws.: native unlucky for in-laws
If Moon is in the 12th house and Mercury is in the 2nd house, the in-laws will be under trouble, turmoil and financial deprivation.: in-laws will be under trouble, turmoil and financial deprivation
If Moon is in the 12th house and Mars is in the 3rd house, happiness and prosperity for brothers/sisters.: happiness and prosperity for brothers/sisters
If Moon is in the 12th house and Ketu is in the 3rd house, grief from children and brothers, may be issueless.: grief from children and brothers, may be issueless
When Venus is in H.No. 12 and Mercury is in H.No. 6, both give exalted results.: Both give exalted results.
If Venus is in an enemy's house and Rahu is in an adjoining house, Rahu will destroy Venus.: Venus is destroyed by Rahu
If Saturn is benefic in H1, one marries before they earn.: Marriage happens before earning starts
If Saturn is benefic in H1, but marriage occurs at 25, wealth and spouse are destroyed.: Marriage at 25 destroys wealth and spouse
Malefic Mercury with Venus in H1 damages progeny.: Progeny is damaged
Saturn and other malefic planets with Venus in H1 are all malefic.: All three (Saturn, Venus, other malefic planets) are malefic
If H7 and H10 are blank together, it forms a Fish Line.: Forms a Fish Line
Spouse is negatively affected if H8 is empty and H9-H12 are malefic.: Spouse is negatively affected.
If Jupiter is in H2 and Mars is destroyed, the native will be a casanova.: Native becomes a casanova.
When both Venus and Moon are malefic, it indicates marital issues.: Marital problems, requires remedy.
If Venus is alone and houses 2 and 7 are empty, romantic relationships bring disrepute.: Romantic relationships lead to disrepute
The aspect of alive male planets on Venus brings prosperity.: Prosperity

If Sun or Jupiter or both are in H2 or H6 and a healthy planet is in H12, the native will be very wealthy but children will be spoilt, with help and gain through brothers, relations and father.: Wealthy, spoiled children, help from relatives
If Saturn is malefic and associated with Venus in H10, the wife will be unhappy and diseased.: Wife will be unhappy and diseased.
After periods of Rahu, Ketu, and Saturn, the native attains a royal position.: Royal position after planetary periods.
With Mercury in the 3rd house and the 2nd house empty, the sister's fortune grows.: Sister's fortune increases.
Mars is extremely destructive if without help of Sun/Moon and Mercury/Ketu in houses 3, 4, or 8.: Mars becomes negative and extremely destructive.
Mars being negative in any house EXCEPT 8 or 12 causes death of elder brother before the native turns 28.: Death of elder brother before age 28.
Mercury/Moon in H.No. 6, Mars with Saturn - Malefic for mother.: Malefic for mother, disease of tongue.
When Moon in H8 becomes malefic it affects H9 (parents).: It will affect H9 (parents).
If Jupiter, Mercury, or Sun are malefic when Mars is in H6, only one son survives.: Only one son will survive
If Ketu is malefic, no happiness from children until age 34.: No happiness from children until 34
If Mars is in H8 and Ketu is in H2, there will be loss of wealth until 28th year of age.: Loss of wealth until age 28
If Mars is in H9 and Mercury is poorly placed, Mars adversely affects parents.: Mars adversely affects parents

When Mercury gives the effects of Saturn located in H12, and both are naturally malefic, the malefic effects are doubled during Mercury's transit.: Malefic effects are doubled during Mercury's transit
If Mercury is in H1 and Saturn or Venus are in H7, the native's wife will be wealthy, chaste, loving and sober.: Wife will be wealthy, chaste, loving and sober
With Mercury in H1, Mars in H12 prevents Mercury from being malefic, although Mars itself may become malefic.: Mercury will never be malefic. Mars may be malefic. Sun never is.

If Mercury is alone in H1 and H7 is empty, Mercury will be malefic but will indicate Royal Combination, winning over others, and helpful to others.: Mercury is malefic, indicates royal combination, wins over others, is helpful to others.
When Mercury is weak or afflicted, it indicates mischief and ill repute.: Mischief and ill-repute.
Weak or afflicted Mercury causes discord with relatives unless Mars is benefic.: Discord with relatives.
Up to age 34, Mercury destroys items of worship, family honor, and works connected with the 9th and 10th houses if afflicted.: Destruction of items related to H9/H10 until age 34.

Moon in 8th, with the 6th not having any of Mercury's friends, causes loss of father's wealth and trouble for maternal uncle and mother's sister's husband.: Loss of father's wealth and trouble for maternal relatives.
Sun and Moon in 3, 5, or 11, with Jupiter in 9, makes evil ineffective, with excellent family, age and wealth.: Evil ineffective, family/age/wealth excellent.
Wealth (Royal Combination) is indicated when Mercury in H6 combines with a good Jupiter, Saturn, and Sun.: Significant wealth and possibly royalty.
Royalty and property increase if Sun, Saturn, and Jupiter are in H2.: Increased wealth, property, and status.
Excellent results when Venus is strong, and Mars/Moon are not malefic, with Mercury in H6.: Significantly improved outcomes.

Sun, Jupiter, or Saturn in the 1st house, with Jupiter benefic, unafflicted, strong, and well-placed, creates a royal combination leading to wealth, power, authority, and immovable property.: Wealth, power, authority, and immovable property

Sun, Jupiter, or Saturn in the 1st house, with Jupiter benefic, unafflicted, strong, and well-placed indicates favorable outcomes in paper merchant or printing press dealings.: Favorable outcomes in paper or printing dealings
Mercury being malefic will cause Mother to either die or remain under adverse circumstances at the age of 34 (effect of Mars is positive).: Mother either dies or faces adversity at age 34
Venus in H4 and Ketu malefic indicates birth of child after 34th year.: Birth of a child after 34th year.
Venus in H4 and malefic Saturn indicate troubled old age and 90 years age.: Troubled old age and 90 years age
Jupiter in H9 signals destruction even if Venus is benefic.: Destruction
With malefic Mercury in H7, till the age of 34 Venus remains malefic.: Venus remains malefic until age 34
If Jupiter is well-placed and the Moon is benefic, Saturn will be like a cool, prosperous mountain.: Saturn gives positive results.
Mars alone in the 10th house of Saturn makes a king.: Wealth and status
If Venus is in H7 or H12, and Sun and Moon are in H5, H9, or H10, and Mars is in H10, then they save children.: Children are saved.
If Saturn is in H5 and Rahu is in H10, destroy items of Sun and Moon in the ancestral house.: Destroy items of Sun and Moon in ancestral house.
If Saturn is in the 5th or 7th house in the natal chart, and Sun, Moon, or Mars come to the 7th house during the annual chart, one's health is adversely affected.: One's health is adversely affected.
If one builds a house or buys one AND Venus is NOT in H7 or H12 AND Sun/Moon are NOT in H5 or H9, the children will be negatively affected.: Children will be negatively affected.
If marriage occurs before age 28 when Saturn is in H6, Moon, Venus, and Ketu become malefic.: Moon, Venus, Ketu become malefic.
If Mercury and Ketu are not malefic when Saturn is in H6, the native will not be childless.: The native is not childless.
After age 42, Saturn in H6 becomes excellent and makes up for everything.: Saturn becomes excellent and makes up for everything.
When Saturn is in H6 AND Rahu is in H8, Saturn will act like a snake, striking H2.: Saturn strikes H2 like a snake.
If Mercury and Venus are in houses 6 and 8, and Saturn is in house 3, Saturn is excellent and there are no enemies.: Saturn is excellent, no enemies.

Sun, Mars, and Moon in H.No.3, Jupiter in H.No. 5, Saturn will not be malefic.: Saturn will not be malefic. No death or untoward event in family but if a skylight is created in last dark room, especially in Southern direction, everything will be ruined within 3 years.
When Rahu is in H2, when Saturn transits to H1 and Jupiter is excellent, wealth comes in abundance.: Wealth in abundance.
If Rahu is in the 5th house and Saturn is malefic, the first wife may not have offspring.: First wife unlikely to have offspring.
If Rahu is in the 5th house, and the Moon is conjunct and the Sun is in the 1st house, then Rahu becomes benefic.: Rahu becomes benefic.
If Rahu is in the 5th house, and the mother lives or provides support, a 'Fish Line' indicating wealth may be present.: Possible 'Fish Line' indicating wealth.

If Rahu is in the 5th house and Sun, Moon, or Mars are in the 4th or the Moon is in the 6th or 12th, then the individual will have sons and good luck for future generations.: Sons and luck not bad; good luck for future generations.
When Rahu is in H6, and Sun is in H2 and Mercury is in H12, expect persistent, undiagnosed diseases.: Persistent undiagnosed diseases
If one adopts a profession associated with Rahu (electricity, jails, police), their fortune will be uncertain.: Uncertain fortune.

If the native changes the root of his house, Moon will turn against Rahu, and Rahu will act against Saturn, leading to litigation, expenditure, quarrels, and bad luck.: Litigation, expenditure, quarrels, bad luck.
Saturn in H6 and Rahu in H8 is a very malefic combination, indicating death by imprisonment, life sentence, or hanging.: Death by imprisonment, life sentence, or hanging.
Rahu in H9, if Jupiter is in H5 or H11, makes the native a renowned psychiatrist.: native will be a renowned doctor of mental diseases
When the planet in H4 moves to H1 in the annual chart, Rahu becomes malefic unless H1 is empty.: Rahu becomes malefic
When Saturn is malefic with Rahu in H10, the native's health and his mother's health will be afflicted.: Native and mother suffer health problems.
When Sun, Venus, and Mars conjoin with Rahu in the 10th house, Rahu will give malefic results.: Fear of enemies and self-destructive tendencies.
If Rahu is alone and Mars does not conjoin, one will suffer loss of wealth if the native remains bare-headed.: Loss of wealth.
If the 2nd house is aspected or connected with Rahu, one will suffer heavily until the age of 36.: Troubles and distress until age 36.
If houses 2, 6, and 8 are benefic, Ketu is benefic.: Ketu is benefic
Ketu in H1 after marriage can cause the death of the father if unfavorable, especially if the birth occurred outside the ancestral place.: death of father
If houses 2 and 7 are blank, Mercury and Venus become malefic, leading to an unlucky period for health.: Mercury and Venus become malefic, leading to an unlucky period for health

If houses 2 and 7 are blank, particularly when there is a birth of a son to a daughter or to a son, health problems can be triggered.: An unlucky period for health, particularly when there is a birth of a son to daughter or to son.
If H8 is blank and Ketu is alone in H2, Ketu becomes benefic.: Ketu becomes benefic
If there is any planet in H8 besides Rahu especially inimical planets like Venus, Moon, Mars and Ketu is in H2, it shortens life.: Shortens life
Even if Moon is exalted with Ketu in H2, it won't give benefic results regarding wealth; royalty and good luck yes, but no wealth accumulation.: No wealth accumulation, but royalty and good luck

If Ketu is in the 5th house, Saturn is in the 9th, and Venus is in the 4th house, Saturn will be benefic for children and domestic life, indicated by a Fish Line.: Saturn is benefic for children and domestic life.
Crying frequently damages progeny.: Reduced progeny
If Ketu in H7 and family grows without obstructions, Saturn is not malefic.: Saturn is not malefic
As the son grows, wealth grows.: Increasing wealth with son's age
Not being true to one's word leads to diseases and domestic troubles caused by a malefic Venus.: Domestic troubles and diseases
Ketu gives benefic results until age 25 when in H8.: Benefic results from Ketu until age 25.
Rahu, Ketu, Mercury, and Saturn together give malefic results from age 26 onward.: Malefic results impacting marital life.
Ketu, Mars, Mercury, Venus together give poor results.: Poor results concerning children and wealth.
Ketu is benefic for the father when in the 9th house.: Father benefits
Ketu is not benefic for the maternal uncle when in the 9th house.: Maternal uncle suffers
Excellent life abroad leads to wealth with Ketu in 9th house.: Wealthy life abroad
Ketu's effects are doubtful and malefic in the 10th house under the influence of Saturn.: Doubtful and malefic effects
Marriage is likely when Mercury or Venus are in houses 1, 2, 10, 11, or 12 in the annual chart, and Saturn supports by being in house 1 or 10.: Marriage likely
Marriage occurs if natal Mercury or Venus is in house 7, without Sun, Moon, or Rahu in houses 3 and 11, and Mercury/Venus come to house 7 in the annual chart.: Marriage occurs

Marriage occurs if Mercury and Venus conjoin through the Mercury's route canal, neither is afflicted, and Saturn alone or conjoined is in house 2, 7, or 12, and none of the conjoined planets is afflicted.: Marriage occurs

Marriage occurs if Mercury or Venus is afflicted/debilitated in the birth chart, but male planets (Sun, Mars, Jupiter) conjoin with female planets (Venus, Moon), and Saturn in transit supports/aspects or is in house 1.: Marriage occurs

If Venus is in house 4 in the natal chart and returns to house 4 in the annual chart without enemy planets in house 2 and 7, marriage may occur but is inauspicious and doubtful.: Inauspicious/doubtful marriage
If Venus is not afflicted, but Saturn is in house 6, especially with Venus in house 2 or 12, marriage around age 18-19 is unfavorable.: Unfavorable marriage at 18-19
Family and wealth go together if Moon is in H4 and Mars and Venus are together.: Family and wealth can exist together.

If Ketu is in H11 and Jupiter, Saturn, or Moon is in H5, there will be a delay in child birth, the child may be born dead, or there may be obstruction or difficulty in child birth.: Delay in childbirth, stillbirth or difficulty in childbirth.
If Sun is in H8, Mars is in H10 or 11, and Moon is destroyed, destruction of progeny.: Destruction of progeny.
If the line of Fate starts from a circle in Pisces area, and the line of union is cut by horizontal lines, then there will be marriage issues.: Marriage problems
If the Line of Fate starts from a sign of Fish in Pisces area (sign of Rahu), and there's a sign of Fish on the mount of Venus, then the person is influenced by Rahu.: Person influenced by Rahu
If the lifeline from the mount of Saturn leads to mount of Mars (negative) cutting the line of life, then Saturn is in house 3.: Saturn in house 3
When a line from the mount of Saturn cuts the line of Health, then Saturn is in House No.5.: Health problems indicated
A line from Mars (negative) to Rahu in sign of Ketu.: Saturn in house 8 indicating danger

If House 4 is empty with Venus in H10, Venus acts like Saturn.: Venus acts like Saturn.

If H3 is empty with Venus in H11, one will be benefitted by remedies of Mars or help of wife's brothers.: Benefit through Mars remedies or help of wife's brothers leading to wealth and family comfort.
If houses 2 and 7 are blank or ill-aspected, Venus gives malefic results.: Venus gives negative results in marriage or relationships.
Blank H10 indicates great wealth.: Very rich.

If Mercury is alone in H1 and H7 is empty, Mercury will be malefic but will indicate Royal Combination, winning over others, and helpful to others.: Mercury is malefic, indicates royal combination, wins over others, is helpful to others.
When Mercury is weak or afflicted, it indicates mischief and ill repute.: Mischief and ill-repute.
Weak or afflicted Mercury causes discord with relatives unless Mars is benefic.: Discord with relatives.
Up to age 34, Mercury destroys items of worship, family honor, and works connected with the 9th and 10th houses if afflicted.: Destruction of items related to H9/H10 until age 34.

Moon in 8th, with the 6th not having any of Mercury's friends, causes loss of father's wealth and trouble for maternal uncle and mother's sister's husband.: Loss of father's wealth and trouble for maternal relatives.

Wealth (Royal Combination) is indicated when Mercury in H6 combines with a good Jupiter, Saturn, and Sun.: Significant wealth and possibly royalty.
Royalty and property increase if Sun, Saturn, and Jupiter are in H2.: Increased wealth, property, and status.
Excellent results when Venus is strong, and Mars/Moon are not malefic, with Mercury in H6.: Significantly improved outcomes.

Sun, Jupiter, or Saturn in the 1st house, with Jupiter benefic, unafflicted, strong, and well-placed, creates a royal combination leading to wealth, power, authority, and immovable property.: Wealth, power, authority, and immovable property

Sun, Jupiter, or Saturn in the 1st house, with Jupiter benefic, unafflicted, strong, and well-placed indicates favorable outcomes in paper merchant or printing press dealings.: Favorable outcomes in paper or printing dealings
Mercury being malefic will cause Mother to either die or remain under adverse circumstances at the age of 34 (effect of Mars is positive).: Mother either dies or faces adversity at age 34
Venus in H4 and Ketu malefic indicates birth of child after 34th year.: Birth of a child after 34th year.
Venus in H4 and malefic Saturn indicate troubled old age and 90 years age.: Troubled old age and 90 years age
Jupiter in H9 signals destruction even if Venus is benefic.: Destruction
With malefic Mercury in H7, till the age of 34 Venus remains malefic.: Venus remains malefic until age 34
If Jupiter is well-placed and the Moon is benefic, Saturn will be like a cool, prosperous mountain.: Saturn gives positive results.
Mars alone in the 10th house of Saturn makes a king.: Wealth and status
If Venus is in H7 or H12, and Sun and Moon are in H5, H9, or H10, and Mars is in H10, then they save children.: Children are saved.

If Saturn is in the 5th or 7th house in the natal chart, and Sun, Moon, or Mars come to the 7th house during the annual chart, one's health is adversely affected.: One's health is adversely affected.
If one builds a house or buys one AND Venus is NOT in H7 or H12 AND Sun/Moon are NOT in H5 or H9, the children will be negatively affected.: Children will be negatively affected.
If marriage occurs before age 28 when Saturn is in H6, Moon, Venus, and Ketu become malefic.: Moon, Venus, Ketu become malefic.
If Mercury and Ketu are not malefic when Saturn is in H6, the native will not be childless.: The native is not childless.
After age 42, Saturn in H6 becomes excellent and makes up for everything.: Saturn becomes excellent and makes up for everything.
When Saturn is in H6 AND Rahu is in H8, Saturn will act like a snake, striking H2.: Saturn strikes H2 like a snake.
If Mercury and Venus are in houses 6 and 8, and Saturn is in house 3, Saturn is excellent and there are no enemies.: Saturn is excellent, no enemies.

Sun, Mars, and Moon in H.No.3, Jupiter in H.No. 5, Saturn will not be malefic.: Saturn will not be malefic. No death or untoward event in family but if a skylight is created in last dark room, especially in Southern direction, everything will be ruined within 3 years.
When Rahu is in H2, when Saturn transits to H1 and Jupiter is excellent, wealth comes in abundance.: Wealth in abundance.
If Rahu is in the 5th house and Saturn is malefic, the first wife may not have offspring.: First wife unlikely to have offspring.
If Rahu is in the 5th house, and the Moon is conjunct and the Sun is in the 1st house, then Rahu becomes benefic.: Rahu becomes benefic.
If Rahu is in the 5th house, and the mother lives or provides support, a 'Fish Line' indicating wealth may be present.: Possible 'Fish Line' indicating wealth.

If Rahu is in the 5th house and Sun, Moon, or Mars are in the 4th or the Moon is in the 6th or 12th, then the individual will have sons and good luck for future generations.: Sons and luck not bad; good luck for future generations.
When Rahu is in H6, and Sun is in H2 and Mercury is in H12, expect persistent, undiagnosed diseases.: Persistent undiagnosed diseases
If one adopts a profession associated with Rahu (electricity, jails, police), their fortune will be uncertain.: Uncertain fortune.

If the native changes the root of his house, Moon will turn against Rahu, and Rahu will act against Saturn, leading to litigation, expenditure, quarrels, and bad luck.: Litigation, expenditure, quarrels, bad luck.
Saturn in H6 and Rahu in H8 is a very malefic combination, indicating death by imprisonment, life sentence, or hanging.: Death by imprisonment, life sentence, or hanging.
Rahu in H9, if Jupiter is in H5 or H11, makes the native a renowned psychiatrist.: native will be a renowned doctor of mental diseases
When the planet in H4 moves to H1 in the annual chart, Rahu becomes malefic unless H1 is empty.: Rahu becomes malefic
When Saturn is malefic with Rahu in H10, the native's health and his mother's health will be afflicted.: Native and mother suffer health problems.
When Sun, Venus, and Mars conjoin with Rahu in the 10th house, Rahu will give malefic results.: Fear of enemies and self-destructive tendencies.

If the 2nd house is aspected or connected with Rahu, one will suffer heavily until the age of 36.: Troubles and distress until age 36.
If houses 2, 6, and 8 are benefic, Ketu is benefic.: Ketu is benefic

If houses 2 and 7 are blank, Mercury and Venus become malefic, leading to an unlucky period for health.: Mercury and Venus become malefic, leading to an unlucky period for health

If H8 is blank and Ketu is alone in H2, Ketu becomes benefic.: Ketu becomes benefic

Even if Moon is exalted with Ketu in H2, it won't give benefic results regarding wealth; royalty and good luck yes, but no wealth accumulation.: No wealth accumulation, but royalty and good luck

Crying frequently damages progeny.: Reduced progeny
If Ketu in H7 and family grows without obstructions, Saturn is not malefic.: Saturn is not malefic
As the son grows, wealth grows.: Increasing wealth with son's age
Not being true to one's word leads to diseases and domestic troubles caused by a malefic Venus.: Domestic troubles and diseases
Ketu gives benefic results until age 25 when in H8.: Benefic results from Ketu until age 25.
Rahu, Ketu, Mercury, and Saturn together give malefic results from age 26 onward.: Malefic results impacting marital life.
Ketu, Mars, Mercury, Venus together give poor results.: Poor results concerning children and wealth.
Ketu is benefic for the father when in the 9th house.: Father benefits
Ketu is not benefic for the maternal uncle when in the 9th house.: Maternal uncle suffers
Excellent life abroad leads to wealth with Ketu in 9th house.: Wealthy life abroad
Ketu's effects are doubtful and malefic in the 10th house under the influence of Saturn.: Doubtful and malefic effects
Marriage is likely when Mercury or Venus are in houses 1, 2, 10, 11, or 12 in the annual chart, and Saturn supports by being in house 1 or 10.: Marriage likely

Marriage occurs if Mercury or Venus is afflicted/debilitated in the birth chart, but male planets (Sun, Mars, Jupiter) conjoin with female planets (Venus, Moon), and Saturn in transit supports/aspects or is in house 1.: Marriage occurs

If Venus is in house 4 in the natal chart and returns to house 4 in the annual chart without enemy planets in house 2 and 7, marriage may occur but is inauspicious and doubtful.: Inauspicious/doubtful marriage
If Venus is not afflicted, but Saturn is in house 6, especially with Venus in house 2 or 12, marriage around age 18-19 is unfavorable.: Unfavorable marriage at 18-19
Family and wealth go together if Moon is in H4 and Mars and Venus are together.: Family and wealth can exist together.

If Ketu is in H11 and Jupiter, Saturn, or Moon is in H5, there will be a delay in child birth, the child may be born dead, or there may be obstruction or difficulty in child birth.: Delay in childbirth, stillbirth or difficulty in childbirth.
If Sun is in H8, Mars is in H10 or 11, and Moon is destroyed, destruction of progeny.: Destruction of progeny.
If the line of Fate starts from a circle in Pisces area, and the line of union is cut by horizontal lines, then there will be marriage issues.: Marriage problems
If the Line of Fate starts from a sign of Fish in Pisces area (sign of Rahu), and there's a sign of Fish on the mount of Venus, then the person is influenced by Rahu.: Person influenced by Rahu
If the lifeline from the mount of Saturn leads to mount of Mars (negative) cutting the line of life, then Saturn is in house 3.: Saturn in house 3

A line from Mars (negative) to Rahu in sign of Ketu.: Saturn in house 8 indicating danger

Rahu in house 8 and Saturn in house 6 can cause sickness from age 28 to 39.: sickness
Rahu in house 8 and Saturn in house 6 can cause sickness from age 28 to 39.: sickness
If Rahu is in House 11 and Ketu in House 5, three male offspring will have asthma and arthritis.: Three male offspring will have asthma and arthritis
House 8 is of Saturn and negative Mars.: House 8 ruled by Saturn and negative Mars

If Saturn is benefic in the 10th house, Ketu is twice benefic. Otherwise, Ketu is twice malefic, painful, causing untimely, unacceptable travel. If the 8th house is afflicted, the results are even more malefic.: untimely unacceptable travel
Wealth will increase from the day of marriage if Saturn and Jupiter are in the 12th house.: Wealth increase
Jupiter, Mercury, Saturn and Rahu in the 12th house leads to poor results in trading.: poor results in trading

Saturn in H1 and Jupiter in H6 or H7 gives wealth and prosperity/growth after marriage, provided none of them gets debilitated during annual position.: Wealth and prosperity after marriage

If Saturn or Jupiter is in H2-5 and the other is in H9-12, then after the age of Saturn (9, 18, 36) up to the age of Jupiter, father, grandfather and tutor will be adversely affected.: Father, grandfather and tutor will be adversely affected between age of Saturn and Jupiter
If Jupiter is in H1-6 and Mercury in H7-12, Jupiter will be benefic till 34th year and Mercury will be malefic from 35th.: Jupiter benefic until 34, Mercury malefic from 35
If Rahu is exalted or in houses 1-6 AND Sun, Moon, and Mars are benefic, Jupiter becomes benefic, providing worldly/spiritual power and strength.: Jupiter becomes benefic and bestows power.
A father's debt causes illiteracy in the clan IF Mercury, Venus, Rahu, or Saturn are in H2, H5, H9, or H12.: Illiteracy in the clan.
If Jupiter in H2 is unpolluted and alone, and H9 has no malefic influence or presence of Mercury, Venus, and Rahu, wealth flows.: Wealth flows.
Venus in H8 and Saturn in H10 causes unhappiness, poor health and adulterous wife.: Nights unhappy, poor health and adulterous wife.
Mercury in H8 and Saturn in H10 causes loss of wealth, poor health of elders, and self in jail.: Loss of wealth, elders' health poor, self also in jail.
Moon in H12, Saturn in H4 and malefic Mercury is destructive.: Destruction
Friendly planets Sun, Moon, Mars in H2 AND Jupiter in 3rd house of the annual chart, brings prosperity between the ages of 26 and 46.: Prosperity all around between age of 26 to 46.
Exalted Saturn and Mercury in H7 creates beneficial connection with foreign affairs.: Beneficial connection with foreign affairs.
Malefic Mercury in houses 3 or 9 can cause a fondness for talking to females, poor health, blood problems.: Fondness for talking to females, poor health, blood problems.
If Saturn is in House 9 or 7, and there is a Fish Line and Moon is benefic, the native gains wealth.: The native gains wealth
If Saturn is malefic and Moon is in H4, helping the poor leads to punishment.: Punishment for helping the poor.
Saturn in H1, H4, or H10 combined with an empty H2 leads to poor conditions and lack of respect.: Poor conditions, no respect, and struggling for basic necessities.

If houses 2, 4, 5, and 6 are all empty, the native is an unfortunate loner in the family.: Unfortunate loner in family, no help from others, repeated deaths of wives, a child will die, run away, or separate.
If Mercury is in H4, H9, or H10, the father will die of blood poisoning when the native is young.: Father's death from blood poisoning at a young age for the native.
Sun in H3 or H5 and Saturn in H9 causes poor results with Saturnian items, leading to fire, poison, or conflict.: Poor results, fire, poison, conflict.
Sun, Saturn, and Mercury in H4, H5, and H9 adversely affect wife, wealth, children, and travel.: Adverse effects on wife, wealth, children, and travel.
Mercury in H6 and Moon in H2 lead to poor eyesight and negative effects of Saturn.: Poor eyesight and negative Saturn effects.
If Rahu and Ketu are exalted, the family gets plenty of wealth.: Family wealth increases.
Mercury in H6 with an unpolluted Sun brings royal wealth through honest earnings.: Increase in wealth through honest means.

Rahu, Ketu, and Saturn in H5, along with Venus, Moon, and Rahu in H2/7, indicate poor physical health; items of Venus' house suffer.: Poor physical health, adverse effect on items of the house containing Venus.
If Sun and Venus are in H5, wife's skin will be adversely affected around age 25/34.: Wife's skin adversely affected.

If friendly planets are with Sun and enemy planets in the same house, the evil effect passes onto items related to friendly planets in that house.: Evil effect transfers to items related to friendly planets.
Wealth increases when Moon is in H2 and Saturn is in H11.: Increase in wealth
Sun in H1 with Saturn influence (25%) leads to vice habits despite power and religiosity.: Prone to vice habits.
Wife will be sickly, especially if the native is fond of daytime sexual activity with his wife, with Venus in H7.: Wife's health is poor.
When Sun is in H3 and Mercury is malefic, Ketu and maternal uncles suffer.: Ketu and maternal uncles suffer.

When Sun is in H3, as long as the Moon is benefic, one's condition remains good, despite malefic influences in H9 and H11.: One's condition remains good.
When Sun is in H3 and Mercury is either with the Sun or adjacent, the native is proficient in Mathematics, Astrology and allied subjects.: Proficient in Mathematics, Astrology and allied subjects.
When Sun is in H3 and Moon is strong, one will be blessed with wealth till old age.: Blessed with wealth till old age.

When Sun is in H3 and Mercury is conjoined, traits of the third house will be favourable but the traits of Mercury may not always remain favourable.: Traits of third house favourable, but traits of Mercury may not be.
If Sun is in H5 and Jupiter is in H10, one loses wives.: One loses wives.
If Sun is in H5 and Saturn is in H3, one loses sons.: One loses sons.
If the Moon is malefic and Rahu and Ketu are in the 5th house, harm occurs at ages 11 and 22.: Harm occurs at ages 11 and 22.

If Sun is in the 6th house and the 2nd house is blank, either the native or their father will serve and gain through the government at the age of 22.: Either the native or their father will serve and gain through the government at the age of 22.
Rahu in the 2nd house and Saturn in the 8th house deprives the native or his wife or both from one eye.: Will deprive the native or his wife or both from one eye.
Jupiter, Venus, and Rahu/Ketu/Sun together destroy separate Mercury.: TB, suicide, fire, defalcations. One would be extremely unhappy.
When Jupiter is before Moon and Ketu is after Moon, Moon becomes malefic, but if Mercury is benefic, Moon gives favorable results.: Moon's effects shift from malefic to benefic.
Father's financial position declines with the native's education, unless Ketu is benefic and unafflicted by Moon.: Father's financial condition declines.
Comfortable life if Venus and Mercury or Mars and Mercury are in the 7th house AND 8th house is not malefic.: Very comfortable life

If one marries before the age of 28 when 7th house is blank, then mother, mother-in-law, grandmother or mother of mother and brothers will be diseased and unlucky.: Mother, mother-in-law, grandmother or mother of mother and brothers will be diseased and unlucky.
Sun in the 1st house and Saturn in the 11th house gives Divine strength.: Divine strength.
If the Moon is with two other malefic planets and Rahu and Ketu are in the 9th house, the wife is malefic.: Wife is malefic
Sun in 5th house and Jupiter in 2nd house creates a Royal combination for wealth.: Creates a Royal combination conferring wealth.

If Venus or Saturn are in the first house, one will lead a comfortable life unless one forgets their deity, in which case they will be extremely unfortunate.: One will lead a comfortable life but if one forgets his deity, he will be extremely unfortunate.
If houses 4, 8, and 12 are afflicted, the Moon is malefic until age 34.: Moon is malefic until age 34

If Mercury is in the 2nd house and Jupiter is in its own houses (9th and 12th), the parents have a long life and the Moon behaves beneficially in the 8th house.: Parents have a long life and Moon becomes benefic
If Rahu, Ketu, Saturn, Venus, and Mercury are in the 11th house and the 2nd house is empty, the Moon in the 8th house kills the mother at age 24.: Mother's death at age 24
Poor life until the age of 34 if Mercury and Sun are malefic.: Difficult life until age 34.
Even if Rahu, Ketu, and Saturn are in House 3 or conjoined with the Moon in H9, House 5 will still be strong.: House 5 is strengthened even with malefic influences.
If Rahu is malefic and linked to Moon in H9, judgement is clouded.: Clouded judgement.
Financial success only after 34th or 48th year if Ketu is in House 2 and Mercury is in House 5.: Financial success delayed until later in life.
Venus in House 3 along with Moon in House 9 will give the results of the companion planets.: Results based on associated planets.

If Moon is in the 12th house and Mars is in the 2nd house, gains through in-laws are uninterrupted.: uninterrupted gains through in-laws
If Moon is in the 12th house and Ketu is in the 2nd house, the native is very unlucky for in-laws.: native unlucky for in-laws
If Moon is in the 12th house and Mercury is in the 2nd house, the in-laws will be under trouble, turmoil and financial deprivation.: in-laws will be under trouble, turmoil and financial deprivation
If Moon is in the 12th house and Mars is in the 3rd house, happiness and prosperity for brothers/sisters.: happiness and prosperity for brothers/sisters

When Venus is in H.No. 12 and Mercury is in H.No. 6, both give exalted results.: Both give exalted results.

Malefic Mercury with Venus in H1 damages progeny.: Progeny is damaged
Saturn and other malefic planets with Venus in H1 are all malefic.: All three (Saturn, Venus, other malefic planets) are malefic
If H7 and H10 are blank together, it forms a Fish Line.: Forms a Fish Line
Spouse is negatively affected if H8 is empty and H9-H12 are malefic.: Spouse is negatively affected.

When both Venus and Moon are malefic, it indicates marital issues.: Marital problems, requires remedy.
If Venus is alone and houses 2 and 7 are empty, romantic relationships bring disrepute.: Romantic relationships lead to disrepute
The aspect of alive male planets on Venus brings prosperity.: Prosperity

If Saturn is malefic and associated with Venus in H10, the wife will be unhappy and diseased.: Wife will be unhappy and diseased.
After periods of Rahu, Ketu, and Saturn, the native attains a royal position.: Royal position after planetary periods.
With Mercury in the 3rd house and the 2nd house empty, the sister's fortune grows.: Sister's fortune increases.
Mars is extremely destructive if without help of Sun/Moon and Mercury/Ketu in houses 3, 4, or 8.: Mars becomes negative and extremely destructive.

Mercury/Moon in H.No. 6, Mars with Saturn - Malefic for mother.: Malefic for mother, disease of tongue.
When Moon in H8 becomes malefic it affects H9 (parents).: It will affect H9 (parents).

With Mercury in H1, Mars in H12 prevents Mercury from being malefic, although Mars itself may become malefic.: Mercury will never be malefic. Mars may be malefic. Sun never is.

Weak or afflicted Mercury causes discord with relatives unless Mars is benefic.: Discord with relatives.

Mars alone in the 10th house of Saturn makes a king.: Wealth and status

Sun, Mars, and Moon in H.No.3, Jupiter in H.No. 5, Saturn will not be malefic.: Saturn will not be malefic. No death or untoward event in family but if a skylight is created in last dark room, especially in Southern direction, everything will be ruined within 3 years.

If houses 2, 6, and 8 are benefic, Ketu is benefic.: Ketu is benefic

If Ketu in H7 and family grows without obstructions, Saturn is not malefic.: Saturn is not malefic
As the son grows, wealth grows.: Increasing wealth with son's age
Not being true to one's word leads to diseases and domestic troubles caused by a malefic Venus.: Domestic troubles and diseases
Ketu gives benefic results until age 25 when in H8.: Benefic results from Ketu until age 25.

Ketu is not benefic for the maternal uncle when in the 9th house.: Maternal uncle suffers
Excellent life abroad leads to wealth with Ketu in 9th house.: Wealthy life abroad
Ketu's effects are doubtful and malefic in the 10th house under the influence of Saturn.: Doubtful and malefic effects
Marriage is likely when Mercury or Venus are in houses 1, 2, 10, 11, or 12 in the annual chart, and Saturn supports by being in house 1 or 10.: Marriage likely

Marriage occurs if Mercury or Venus is afflicted/debilitated in the birth chart, but male planets (Sun, Mars, Jupiter) conjoin with female planets (Venus, Moon), and Saturn in transit supports/aspects or is in house 1.: Marriage occurs

Family and wealth go together if Moon is in H4 and Mars and Venus are together.: Family and wealth can exist together.

If Ketu is in H11 and Jupiter, Saturn, or Moon is in H5, there will be a delay in child birth, the child may be born dead, or there may be obstruction or difficulty in child birth.: Delay in childbirth, stillbirth or difficulty in childbirth.
If Sun is in H8, Mars is in H10 or 11, and Moon is destroyed, destruction of progeny.: Destruction of progeny.

Jupiter acts as malefic when Saturn is in house 4 and Jupiter is in houses 2, 8, 10 or 11.: Jupiter acts as malefic

If Saturn or Jupiter is in H2-5 and the other is in H9-12, then after the age of Saturn (9, 18, 36) up to the age of Jupiter, father, grandfather and tutor will be adversely affected.: Father, grandfather and tutor will be adversely affected between age of Saturn and Jupiter
If Jupiter is in H1-6 and Mercury in H7-12, Jupiter will be benefic till 34th year and Mercury will be malefic from 35th.: Jupiter benefic until 34, Mercury malefic from 35
If Rahu is exalted or in houses 1-6 AND Sun, Moon, and Mars are benefic, Jupiter becomes benefic, providing worldly/spiritual power and strength.: Jupiter becomes benefic and bestows power.
A father's debt causes illiteracy in the clan IF Mercury, Venus, Rahu, or Saturn are in H2, H5, H9, or H12.: Illiteracy in the clan.
If Jupiter in H2 is unpolluted and alone, and H9 has no malefic influence or presence of Mercury, Venus, and Rahu, wealth flows.: Wealth flows.
Venus in H8 and Saturn in H10 causes unhappiness, poor health and adulterous wife.: Nights unhappy, poor health and adulterous wife.
Mercury in H8 and Saturn in H10 causes loss of wealth, poor health of elders, and self in jail.: Loss of wealth, elders' health poor, self also in jail.
Moon in H12, Saturn in H4 and malefic Mercury is destructive.: Destruction
Friendly planets Sun, Moon, Mars in H2 AND Jupiter in 3rd house of the annual chart, brings prosperity between the ages of 26 and 46.: Prosperity all around between age of 26 to 46.
Exalted Saturn and Mercury in H7 creates beneficial connection with foreign affairs.: Beneficial connection with foreign affairs.
Malefic Mercury in houses 3 or 9 can cause a fondness for talking to females, poor health, blood problems.: Fondness for talking to females, poor health, blood problems.
If Saturn is in House 9 or 7, and there is a Fish Line and Moon is benefic, the native gains wealth.: The native gains wealth
If Saturn is malefic and Moon is in H4, helping the poor leads to punishment.: Punishment for helping the poor.
Saturn in H1, H4, or H10 combined with an empty H2 leads to poor conditions and lack of respect.: Poor conditions, no respect, and struggling for basic necessities.

If houses 2, 4, 5, and 6 are all empty, the native is an unfortunate loner in the family.: Unfortunate loner in family, no help from others, repeated deaths of wives, a child will die, run away, or separate.
If Mercury is in H4, H9, or H10, the father will die of blood poisoning when the native is young.: Father's death from blood poisoning at a young age for the native.
Sun in H3 or H5 and Saturn in H9 causes poor results with Saturnian items, leading to fire, poison, or conflict.: Poor results, fire, poison, conflict.
Sun, Saturn, and Mercury in H4, H5, and H9 adversely affect wife, wealth, children, and travel.: Adverse effects on wife, wealth, children, and travel.
Mercury in H6 and Moon in H2 lead to poor eyesight and negative effects of Saturn.: Poor eyesight and negative Saturn effects.
If Rahu and Ketu are exalted, the family gets plenty of wealth.: Family wealth increases.
Mercury in H6 with an unpolluted Sun brings royal wealth through honest earnings.: Increase in wealth through honest means.

Rahu, Ketu, and Saturn in H5, along with Venus, Moon, and Rahu in H2/7, indicate poor physical health; items of Venus' house suffer.: Poor physical health, adverse effect on items of the house containing Venus.
If Sun and Venus are in H5, wife's skin will be adversely affected around age 25/34.: Wife's skin adversely affected.

If friendly planets are with Sun and enemy planets in the same house, the evil effect passes onto items related to friendly planets in that house.: Evil effect transfers to items related to friendly planets.
Wealth increases when Moon is in H2 and Saturn is in H11.: Increase in wealth
Sun in H1 with Saturn influence (25%) leads to vice habits despite power and religiosity.: Prone to vice habits.
Wife will be sickly, especially if the native is fond of daytime sexual activity with his wife, with Venus in H7.: Wife's health is poor.
When Sun is in H3 and Mercury is malefic, Ketu and maternal uncles suffer.: Ketu and maternal uncles suffer.
When Sun is in H3 and Moon is malefic, losses or thefts occur during the day.: Losses/thefts in day time.
When Sun is in H3, as long as the Moon is benefic, one's condition remains good, despite malefic influences in H9 and H11.: One's condition remains good.
When Sun is in H3 and Mercury is either with the Sun or adjacent, the native is proficient in Mathematics, Astrology and allied subjects.: Proficient in Mathematics, Astrology and allied subjects.
When Sun is in H3 and Moon is strong, one will be blessed with wealth till old age.: Blessed with wealth till old age.

When Sun is in H3 and Mercury is conjoined, traits of the third house will be favourable but the traits of Mercury may not always remain favourable.: Traits of third house favourable, but traits of Mercury may not be.
If Sun is in H5 and Jupiter is in H10, one loses wives.: One loses wives.
If Sun is in H5 and Saturn is in H3, one loses sons.: One loses sons.
If the Moon is malefic and Rahu and Ketu are in the 5th house, harm occurs at ages 11 and 22.: Harm occurs at ages 11 and 22.

If Sun is in the 6th house and the 2nd house is blank, either the native or their father will serve and gain through the government at the age of 22.: Either the native or their father will serve and gain through the government at the age of 22.
Rahu in the 2nd house and Saturn in the 8th house deprives the native or his wife or both from one eye.: Will deprive the native or his wife or both from one eye.
Jupiter, Venus, and Rahu/Ketu/Sun together destroy separate Mercury.: TB, suicide, fire, defalcations. One would be extremely unhappy.
When Jupiter is before Moon and Ketu is after Moon, Moon becomes malefic, but if Mercury is benefic, Moon gives favorable results.: Moon's effects shift from malefic to benefic.
Father's financial position declines with the native's education, unless Ketu is benefic and unafflicted by Moon.: Father's financial condition declines.
Comfortable life if Venus and Mercury or Mars and Mercury are in the 7th house AND 8th house is not malefic.: Very comfortable life

If one marries before the age of 28 when 7th house is blank, then mother, mother-in-law, grandmother or mother of mother and brothers will be diseased and unlucky.: Mother, mother-in-law, grandmother or mother of mother and brothers will be diseased and unlucky.
Sun in the 1st house and Saturn in the 11th house gives Divine strength.: Divine strength.
If the Moon is with two other malefic planets and Rahu and Ketu are in the 9th house, the wife is malefic.: Wife is malefic
Sun in 5th house and Jupiter in 2nd house creates a Royal combination for wealth.: Creates a Royal combination conferring wealth.

If Venus or Saturn are in the first house, one will lead a comfortable life unless one forgets their deity, in which case they will be extremely unfortunate.: One will lead a comfortable life but if one forgets his deity, he will be extremely unfortunate.
If houses 4, 8, and 12 are afflicted, the Moon is malefic until age 34.: Moon is malefic until age 34

If Mercury is in the 2nd house and Jupiter is in its own houses (9th and 12th), the parents have a long life and the Moon behaves beneficially in the 8th house.: Parents have a long life and Moon becomes benefic
If Rahu, Ketu, Saturn, Venus, and Mercury are in the 11th house and the 2nd house is empty, the Moon in the 8th house kills the mother at age 24.: Mother's death at age 24
Poor life until the age of 34 if Mercury and Sun are malefic.: Difficult life until age 34.
Even if Rahu, Ketu, and Saturn are in House 3 or conjoined with the Moon in H9, House 5 will still be strong.: House 5 is strengthened even with malefic influences.
If Rahu is malefic and linked to Moon in H9, judgement is clouded.: Clouded judgement.
Financial success only after 34th or 48th year if Ketu is in House 2 and Mercury is in House 5.: Financial success delayed until later in life.
Venus in House 3 along with Moon in House 9 will give the results of the companion planets.: Results based on associated planets.
If Moon is in the 12th house and Mars is in the 1st house, the native receives respect from rulers and superiors.: respect from rulers and superiors

If Moon is in the 12th house and Ketu is in the 1st house, the native is unlucky and faces litigations, prosecutions, and warrants of arrest.: unlucky native, litigations, prosecutions, warrants of arrest
If Moon is in the 12th house and Mercury is in the 1st house, the native experiences loss and grief through superiors and official position.: loss and grief through superiors and official position
If Moon is in the 12th house and Mars is in the 2nd house, gains through in-laws are uninterrupted.: uninterrupted gains through in-laws
If Moon is in the 12th house and Ketu is in the 2nd house, the native is very unlucky for in-laws.: native unlucky for in-laws
If Moon is in the 12th house and Mercury is in the 2nd house, the in-laws will be under trouble, turmoil and financial deprivation.: in-laws will be under trouble, turmoil and financial deprivation
If Moon is in the 12th house and Mars is in the 3rd house, happiness and prosperity for brothers/sisters.: happiness and prosperity for brothers/sisters
If Moon is in the 12th house and Ketu is in the 3rd house, grief from children and brothers, may be issueless.: grief from children and brothers, may be issueless
When Venus is in H.No. 12 and Mercury is in H.No. 6, both give exalted results.: Both give exalted results.
If Venus is in an enemy's house and Rahu is in an adjoining house, Rahu will destroy Venus.: Venus is destroyed by Rahu
If Saturn is benefic in H1, one marries before they earn.: Marriage happens before earning starts
If Saturn is benefic in H1, but marriage occurs at 25, wealth and spouse are destroyed.: Marriage at 25 destroys wealth and spouse
Malefic Mercury with Venus in H1 damages progeny.: Progeny is damaged
Saturn and other malefic planets with Venus in H1 are all malefic.: All three (Saturn, Venus, other malefic planets) are malefic
If H7 and H10 are blank together, it forms a Fish Line.: Forms a Fish Line
Spouse is negatively affected if H8 is empty and H9-H12 are malefic.: Spouse is negatively affected.
If Jupiter is in H2 and Mars is destroyed, the native will be a casanova.: Native becomes a casanova.
When both Venus and Moon are malefic, it indicates marital issues.: Marital problems, requires remedy.
If Venus is alone and houses 2 and 7 are empty, romantic relationships bring disrepute.: Romantic relationships lead to disrepute
The aspect of alive male planets on Venus brings prosperity.: Prosperity

If Sun or Jupiter or both are in H2 or H6 and a healthy planet is in H12, the native will be very wealthy but children will be spoilt, with help and gain through brothers, relations and father.: Wealthy, spoiled children, help from relatives
If Saturn is malefic and associated with Venus in H10, the wife will be unhappy and diseased.: Wife will be unhappy and diseased.
After periods of Rahu, Ketu, and Saturn, the native attains a royal position.: Royal position after planetary periods.
With Mercury in the 3rd house and the 2nd house empty, the sister's fortune grows.: Sister's fortune increases.
Mars is extremely destructive if without help of Sun/Moon and Mercury/Ketu in houses 3, 4, or 8.: Mars becomes negative and extremely destructive.
Mars being negative in any house EXCEPT 8 or 12 causes death of elder brother before the native turns 28.: Death of elder brother before age 28.
Mercury/Moon in H.No. 6, Mars with Saturn - Malefic for mother.: Malefic for mother, disease of tongue.
When Moon in H8 becomes malefic it affects H9 (parents).: It will affect H9 (parents).
If Jupiter, Mercury, or Sun are malefic when Mars is in H6, only one son survives.: Only one son will survive
If Ketu is malefic, no happiness from children until age 34.: No happiness from children until 34
If Mars is in H8 and Ketu is in H2, there will be loss of wealth until 28th year of age.: Loss of wealth until age 28
If Mars is in H9 and Mercury is poorly placed, Mars adversely affects parents.: Mars adversely affects parents

When Mercury gives the effects of Saturn located in H12, and both are naturally malefic, the malefic effects are doubled during Mercury's transit.: Malefic effects are doubled during Mercury's transit
If Mercury is in H1 and Saturn or Venus are in H7, the native's wife will be wealthy, chaste, loving and sober.: Wife will be wealthy, chaste, loving and sober
With Mercury in H1, Mars in H12 prevents Mercury from being malefic, although Mars itself may become malefic.: Mercury will never be malefic. Mars may be malefic. Sun never is.

If Mercury is alone in H1 and H7 is empty, Mercury will be malefic but will indicate Royal Combination, winning over others, and helpful to others.: Mercury is malefic, indicates royal combination, wins over others, is helpful to others.
When Mercury is weak or afflicted, it indicates mischief and ill repute.: Mischief and ill-repute.
Weak or afflicted Mercury causes discord with relatives unless Mars is benefic.: Discord with relatives.
Up to age 34, Mercury destroys items of worship, family honor, and works connected with the 9th and 10th houses if afflicted.: Destruction of items related to H9/H10 until age 34.

Moon in 8th, with the 6th not having any of Mercury's friends, causes loss of father's wealth and trouble for maternal uncle and mother's sister's husband.: Loss of father's wealth and trouble for maternal relatives.
Sun and Moon in 3, 5, or 11, with Jupiter in 9, makes evil ineffective, with excellent family, age and wealth.: Evil ineffective, family/age/wealth excellent.
Wealth (Royal Combination) is indicated when Mercury in H6 combines with a good Jupiter, Saturn, and Sun.: Significant wealth and possibly royalty.
Royalty and property increase if Sun, Saturn, and Jupiter are in H2.: Increased wealth, property, and status.
Excellent results when Venus is strong, and Mars/Moon are not malefic, with Mercury in H6.: Significantly improved outcomes.

Sun, Jupiter, or Saturn in the 1st house, with Jupiter benefic, unafflicted, strong, and well-placed, creates a royal combination leading to wealth, power, authority, and immovable property.: Wealth, power, authority, and immovable property

Sun, Jupiter, or Saturn in the 1st house, with Jupiter benefic, unafflicted, strong, and well-placed indicates favorable outcomes in paper merchant or printing press dealings.: Favorable outcomes in paper or printing dealings
Mercury being malefic will cause Mother to either die or remain under adverse circumstances at the age of 34 (effect of Mars is positive).: Mother either dies or faces adversity at age 34
Venus in H4 and Ketu malefic indicates birth of child after 34th year.: Birth of a child after 34th year.
Venus in H4 and malefic Saturn indicate troubled old age and 90 years age.: Troubled old age and 90 years age
Jupiter in H9 signals destruction even if Venus is benefic.: Destruction
With malefic Mercury in H7, till the age of 34 Venus remains malefic.: Venus remains malefic until age 34
If Jupiter is well-placed and the Moon is benefic, Saturn will be like a cool, prosperous mountain.: Saturn gives positive results.
Mars alone in the 10th house of Saturn makes a king.: Wealth and status
If Venus is in H7 or H12, and Sun and Moon are in H5, H9, or H10, and Mars is in H10, then they save children.: Children are saved.
If Saturn is in H5 and Rahu is in H10, destroy items of Sun and Moon in the ancestral house.: Destroy items of Sun and Moon in ancestral house.
If Saturn is in the 5th or 7th house in the natal chart, and Sun, Moon, or Mars come to the 7th house during the annual chart, one's health is adversely affected.: One's health is adversely affected.
If one builds a house or buys one AND Venus is NOT in H7 or H12 AND Sun/Moon are NOT in H5 or H9, the children will be negatively affected.: Children will be negatively affected.
If marriage occurs before age 28 when Saturn is in H6, Moon, Venus, and Ketu become malefic.: Moon, Venus, Ketu become malefic.
If Mercury and Ketu are not malefic when Saturn is in H6, the native will not be childless.: The native is not childless.
After age 42, Saturn in H6 becomes excellent and makes up for everything.: Saturn becomes excellent and makes up for everything.
When Saturn is in H6 AND Rahu is in H8, Saturn will act like a snake, striking H2.: Saturn strikes H2 like a snake.
If Mercury and Venus are in houses 6 and 8, and Saturn is in house 3, Saturn is excellent and there are no enemies.: Saturn is excellent, no enemies.

Sun, Mars, and Moon in H.No.3, Jupiter in H.No. 5, Saturn will not be malefic.: Saturn will not be malefic. No death or untoward event in family but if a skylight is created in last dark room, especially in Southern direction, everything will be ruined within 3 years.
When Rahu is in H2, when Saturn transits to H1 and Jupiter is excellent, wealth comes in abundance.: Wealth in abundance.
If Rahu is in the 5th house and Saturn is malefic, the first wife may not have offspring.: First wife unlikely to have offspring.
If Rahu is in the 5th house, and the Moon is conjunct and the Sun is in the 1st house, then Rahu becomes benefic.: Rahu becomes benefic.
If Rahu is in the 5th house, and the mother lives or provides support, a 'Fish Line' indicating wealth may be present.: Possible 'Fish Line' indicating wealth.

If Rahu is in the 5th house and Sun, Moon, or Mars are in the 4th or the Moon is in the 6th or 12th, then the individual will have sons and good luck for future generations.: Sons and luck not bad; good luck for future generations.
When Rahu is in H6, and Sun is in H2 and Mercury is in H12, expect persistent, undiagnosed diseases.: Persistent undiagnosed diseases
If one adopts a profession associated with Rahu (electricity, jails, police), their fortune will be uncertain.: Uncertain fortune.

If the native changes the root of his house, Moon will turn against Rahu, and Rahu will act against Saturn, leading to litigation, expenditure, quarrels, and bad luck.: Litigation, expenditure, quarrels, bad luck.
Saturn in H6 and Rahu in H8 is a very malefic combination, indicating death by imprisonment, life sentence, or hanging.: Death by imprisonment, life sentence, or hanging.
Rahu in H9, if Jupiter is in H5 or H11, makes the native a renowned psychiatrist.: native will be a renowned doctor of mental diseases
When the planet in H4 moves to H1 in the annual chart, Rahu becomes malefic unless H1 is empty.: Rahu becomes malefic
When Saturn is malefic with Rahu in H10, the native's health and his mother's health will be afflicted.: Native and mother suffer health problems.
When Sun, Venus, and Mars conjoin with Rahu in the 10th house, Rahu will give malefic results.: Fear of enemies and self-destructive tendencies.
If Rahu is alone and Mars does not conjoin, one will suffer loss of wealth if the native remains bare-headed.: Loss of wealth.
If the 2nd house is aspected or connected with Rahu, one will suffer heavily until the age of 36.: Troubles and distress until age 36.
If houses 2, 6, and 8 are benefic, Ketu is benefic.: Ketu is benefic
Ketu in H1 after marriage can cause the death of the father if unfavorable, especially if the birth occurred outside the ancestral place.: death of father
If houses 2 and 7 are blank, Mercury and Venus become malefic, leading to an unlucky period for health.: Mercury and Venus become malefic, leading to an unlucky period for health

If houses 2 and 7 are blank, particularly when there is a birth of a son to a daughter or to a son, health problems can be triggered.: An unlucky period for health, particularly when there is a birth of a son to daughter or to son.
If H8 is blank and Ketu is alone in H2, Ketu becomes benefic.: Ketu becomes benefic
If there is any planet in H8 besides Rahu especially inimical planets like Venus, Moon, Mars and Ketu is in H2, it shortens life.: Shortens life
Even if Moon is exalted with Ketu in H2, it won't give benefic results regarding wealth; royalty and good luck yes, but no wealth accumulation.: No wealth accumulation, but royalty and good luck

If Ketu is in the 5th house, Saturn is in the 9th, and Venus is in the 4th house, Saturn will be benefic for children and domestic life, indicated by a Fish Line.: Saturn is benefic for children and domestic life.
Crying frequently damages progeny.: Reduced progeny
If Ketu in H7 and family grows without obstructions, Saturn is not malefic.: Saturn is not malefic
As the son grows, wealth grows.: Increasing wealth with son's age
Not being true to one's word leads to diseases and domestic troubles caused by a malefic Venus.: Domestic troubles and diseases
Ketu gives benefic results until age 25 when in H8.: Benefic results from Ketu until age 25.
Rahu, Ketu, Mercury, and Saturn together give malefic results from age 26 onward.: Malefic results impacting marital life.
Ketu, Mars, Mercury, Venus together give poor results.: Poor results concerning children and wealth.
Ketu is benefic for the father when in the 9th house.: Father benefits
Ketu is not benefic for the maternal uncle when in the 9th house.: Maternal uncle suffers
Excellent life abroad leads to wealth with Ketu in 9th house.: Wealthy life abroad
Ketu's effects are doubtful and malefic in the 10th house under the influence of Saturn.: Doubtful and malefic effects
Marriage is likely when Mercury or Venus are in houses 1, 2, 10, 11, or 12 in the annual chart, and Saturn supports by being in house 1 or 10.: Marriage likely
Marriage occurs if natal Mercury or Venus is in house 7, without Sun, Moon, or Rahu in houses 3 and 11, and Mercury/Venus come to house 7 in the annual chart.: Marriage occurs

Marriage occurs if Mercury and Venus conjoin through the Mercury's route canal, neither is afflicted, and Saturn alone or conjoined is in house 2, 7, or 12, and none of the conjoined planets is afflicted.: Marriage occurs

Marriage occurs if Mercury or Venus is afflicted/debilitated in the birth chart, but male planets (Sun, Mars, Jupiter) conjoin with female planets (Venus, Moon), and Saturn in transit supports/aspects or is in house 1.: Marriage occurs

If Venus is in house 4 in the natal chart and returns to house 4 in the annual chart without enemy planets in house 2 and 7, marriage may occur but is inauspicious and doubtful.: Inauspicious/doubtful marriage
If Venus is not afflicted, but Saturn is in house 6, especially with Venus in house 2 or 12, marriage around age 18-19 is unfavorable.: Unfavorable marriage at 18-19
Family and wealth go together if Moon is in H4 and Mars and Venus are together.: Family and wealth can exist together.

If Ketu is in H11 and Jupiter, Saturn, or Moon is in H5, there will be a delay in child birth, the child may be born dead, or there may be obstruction or difficulty in child birth.: Delay in childbirth, stillbirth or difficulty in childbirth.
If Sun is in H8, Mars is in H10 or 11, and Moon is destroyed, destruction of progeny.: Destruction of progeny.
If the line of Fate starts from a circle in Pisces area, and the line of union is cut by horizontal lines, then there will be marriage issues.: Marriage problems
If the Line of Fate starts from a sign of Fish in Pisces area (sign of Rahu), and there's a sign of Fish on the mount of Venus, then the person is influenced by Rahu.: Person influenced by Rahu
If the lifeline from the mount of Saturn leads to mount of Mars (negative) cutting the line of life, then Saturn is in house 3.: Saturn in house 3
When a line from the mount of Saturn cuts the line of Health, then Saturn is in House No.5.: Health problems indicated
A line from Mars (negative) to Rahu in sign of Ketu.: Saturn in house 8 indicating danger

predictions: Jupiter-Moon together -> Hidden wealth (20 units): Hidden wealth, yielding 20 base income units.
Sun-Mercury together -> Royal advisor (13 units): Royal advisor, yielding 13 base income units.
If Saturn is in H.No.4, it will give property at the age of 36.: Property acquisition at age 36.
A house with Ketu will give ill effects on children and wife, unless Jupiter or Sun are adversely affected by their enemy planets.: Ill effect on children and wife
If a male planet (Sun, Mars, or Jupiter) is alone or with other male planets in the 8th house, the 8th house is no longer the house of death.: No deaths
Mars in House 9 and Mercury and Ketu in any other two houses indicates widowhood in family and hard luck for the family.: Widowhood and hard luck
If Sun and Saturn are not linked with Jupiter, they cause losses, increase expenses, and decrease wealth.: Causes losses, increase expenses and decrease the wealth.

If Jupiter is posited alone, notwithstanding malefic aspect of another planet, Jupiter would never give malefic effects.: Jupiter gives benefic effects even with malefic aspects from other planets, as long as it is not conjunct/etc. with them.
Jupiter before Rahu indicates mastery of worldly things, while Rahu before Jupiter indicates spirituality.: Either worldly or spiritual power, depending on which planet is before the other.
Moon determines the condition of wealth and position when Jupiter is in H7 and one's assets would increase because of support of females/sex.: Wealth and position are determined by the Moon.
Saturn in the 4th house gives long life to the father, comfort, and property.: Long life of father, comfort and property.
When one keeps rice, silver etc., he will have ancestral property.: Ancestral property.
Mother's longevity is assured up to the native's 48th year if Rahu, Ketu, and Saturn are not in houses 4, 6, 9, 10, or 12.: Mother lives until native's 48th year.
If a son is born when Venus is in H6, the next son will be born after 12 years.: Second son born after 12 years
Venus in H6 does not directly affect the individual but their partner.: Effects primarily impact partner
The native should not marry a person who is the only child of his/her parents; in such a case, the malefic effect of Mars will manifest.: Avoid marrying only children to avoid Mars malefic effects
If a planet other than Mars or Jupiter is in H6 or H7, Venus and other planets will become malefic.: Venus and other planets become malefic
If houses 2 and 7 are blank or ill-aspected, Venus gives malefic results.: Venus gives negative results in marriage or relationships.
Jupiter, Sun, Mercury, and Saturn in houses 8, 9, 10, or 12, with no influence from enemy planets, give an excellent life.: Excellent life
If Moon is in H7, the native will excel in drinking and overeating resulting in a troubled life.: Native excels at drinking and overeating, leading to a troubled life.
Saturn in the fourth house poisons the effects of Sun and Moon.: Sun and Moon give negative results
Saturn in H4 aspects houses 2, 8, 10, and 11 with four eyes, influencing planets/items within those houses.: Houses 2, 8, 10, and 11 are influenced by Saturn.

Laying the foundation of a house while Saturn is in H4 brings misfortune related to snakes and poison to the mother and maternal uncle.: Mother will get a snake bite, maternal uncle will be poisoned, and financial conditions will be destroyed until Saturn's age.
Saturn in H4 will not cause malefic effects, unless the native womanizes, poisoning Venus' effects.: Venus's effects are poisoned, likely marital discord, if the native womanizes.
Rahu in the first house eclipses the Sun.: Sun is eclipsed
When Rahu is in the 1st house, the house where the Sun is placed will be afflicted.: The house where Sun is located will face difficulties/afflictions.

Mercury acts as the trunk of Rahu, influencing houses 1-6 based on Mercury's position, except when Sun and Mercury are in H3.: Houses 1-6 are influenced by Mercury's condition and placement as it acts as Rahu's trunk; this does not apply if Sun/Mercury are in H3.
When Rahu is in the first house, the native's father will face hardships and losses at the ages of 11, 21 and 42.: Father will face hardships and losses around the ages of 11, 21, and 42.
With Rahu in the first house, the native will experience frequent job transfers but infrequent promotions.: Frequent job transfers but infrequent promotions in career.
Ketu becomes the body of Rahu, and influences houses 7 to 12 based on Ketu's position.: Houses 7-12 are influenced by Ketu's condition and placement as it acts as Rahu's body.
If a son is born when Ketu is in the 4th house, he will have a long life.: Son will have a long life.
Ketu in the 4th house is lucky and favorable for the father.: Lucky and favorable for father.
With Ketu in the 4th house, birth of a male child will be delayed.: Birth of male child will be delayed.
With Ketu in the 4th house, articles of the Moon will not be beneficial.: Articles of Moon are not beneficial.
Enemy planets in the 3rd house damage male offspring when Ketu is in the 9th house.: Damaged male progeny
Ketu in H3 -> Live alone away from friends/relatives.: Live alone away from friends/relatives.
Rahu in H1 -> Marriage at the age of 21 is meaningless.: Marriage at the age of 21 is meaningless.
Jupiter in H7 -> With Sun-Jupiter or Mars-Jupiter, father and spouse do not survive together.: With Sun-Jupiter or Mars-Jupiter, father and spouse do not survive together.
Marriage is inauspicious if Venus in the annual chart is in the 4th house, matching its original placement, and the 2nd and 7th houses are devoid of Sun, Moon, or Rahu.: Inauspicious
Marriage is impacted negatively if Venus is not afflicted, but Saturn is in the 6th house, especially when Venus is in the 2nd or 12th house.: Inauspicious marriage timing

If Mercury gives support to Venus using route canal principle, then marriage is brought about by the following combinations in the annual chart, Mercury or Venus in houses 1,2,10,11,12, and Saturn supports them by being in house 12 or in the 7th.: Good marriage prospects
Marriage is brought about if Mercury or Venus are in houses 1, 2, 10, 11 or 12 AND Saturn supports by being in house 4.: Marriage occurs
If a person with Saturn in house 7 does not marry before age 22, he would lose his eyesight.: Loss of eyesight
If Jupiter is in house 1 and house 7 is empty, then early marriage is advisable.: Early marriage is advisable
If Saturn is in the 7th house, and marriage does not occur before age 22, the person may lose their eyesight.: Loss of eyesight
If Jupiter is in the 1st house and the 7th house is empty, early marriage is advisable.: Early marriage is advisable

Rahu in the 5th house, and Saturn is malefic, the first wife sees no offspring.: First wife sees no offspring

Excellent results (business/intellectual pursuit) are seen if Venus is strong, Mars or Moon are not malefic.: Excellent business and intellectual pursuits
Royal combination (wealth) occurs with good Jupiter, Saturn, and Sun.: Royal Combination (wealth)
When Jupiter is malefic and Saturn is benefic, one will conquer all adversity.: Conquer all adversity
Jupiter and Saturn together in any house with the Sun in the first house gives excellent results if Jupiter and Saturn are benefic.: Excellent results

Rahu is debilitated if in houses 9-12 and Ketu is debilitated if in houses 3 or 6.: Rahu and Ketu are debilitated.
Venus conjunct Mercury assures prosperity. However, wealth abundance is conditional on lack of aspect (presumably malefic) or a benefic Saturn.: Abundance of Wealth
If Rahu is benefic but not dormant, and house 8 is blank, this can lead to increased wealth.: Increased wealth
Jupiter in house 2 is unpolluted and alone, and house 9 is neither malefic nor contains Mercury, Venus, and Rahu.: Increased Wealth

Rahu in house 8 and Saturn in house 6 can cause sickness from age 28 to 39.: sickness
